name: Lafayette Tower CAT Entertainment Host

securitySheaf.label: Credential Probe
securitySheaf.effect: Badge, route, and activity-profile verification begins.

securitySheaf.label: Trace Lattice
securitySheaf.effect: CAT correlation systems start linking deck signature, route, and possible physical location.

securitySheaf.label: Scramble / Rights Collapse
securitySheaf.effect: Directories, schedules, and media assets remix; decoy routes multiply.

securitySheaf.label: Handler Tar Baby
securitySheaf.effect: Producer and handler icons try to trap the decker in approval loops and focus tests.

securitySheaf.label: Killer / Blaster Response
securitySheaf.effect: Hard security icons engage with dangerous force.

securitySheaf.label: Building Security Crosslink
securitySheaf.effect: Physical Lafayette Tower security receives correlated alerts.

securitySheaf.label: Ultraviolet Containment Protocol
securitySheaf.effect: The host seals routes and brings UV-native constructs or psychotropic pressure to bear.

securitySheaf.label: CAT Executive Security Event
securitySheaf.effect: CAT treats the intrusion as a strategic compromise, not a local alert.

sculpting: A vertical entertainment-corporate arcology: glass atriums, marquees, executive elevators, gold-record rooms, focus-test theaters, prototype simsense rigs, rigging catwalks, and a hidden black-stage Ultraviolet basement.
notes: Local Cross Applied Technology entertainment-division host at Lafayette Tower. Extremely dangerous. The Ultraviolet layer should reveal only after deep-host success or story permission.

nodes.title: Music Circle Grid Approach
nodes.description: Lafayette Tower rises from the Music Circle grid like a sealed vertical studio campus. The public face is beautiful; the access surface is not public at all.

choices.label: Enter through a high-grade entertainment-division credential chain
Read the tower's public media and vendor traffic from outside

nodes.title: Visitor Demo Cloud
nodes.description: Sanitized demo reels, visitor kiosks, vendor packets, and public-facing division language orbit the tower like carefully lit advertisements.

choices.label: Find a real route from public traffic into the corporate shell
Search public material for hidden project-routing seams

nodes.title: Glass Atrium Corporate Shell
nodes.description: A bright corporate atrium stacks lobby surfaces, marquees, executive elevator banks, security spotlights, and visitor-management avatars into a single controlled view.

choices.label: Map corporate administration and licensing corridors
Find talent analytics behind the public studio polish
Probe building and production slave systems

nodes.title: Licensing Elevator Bank
nodes.description: Executive elevators rise through gold-record conference rooms, contract vaults, royalty engines, partner offices, and private listening rooms.

choices.label: Open artist, vendor, and brand-partner contracts
Follow executive routing toward R&D
Return to the glass atrium

nodes.title: Contract Vault Suite
nodes.description: Private listening rooms and sealed contract vaults hold licensing leverage, talent obligations, legal-risk notes, and partner-control agreements.

choices.label: Copy contract leverage and partner-control records
Alter a contract, release control, or routing flag
Look for R&D project names in legal routing

nodes.title: Focus-Test Theater
nodes.description: Mirrored observation booths, heat-map audiences, reaction-score constellations, and model stages watch the decker as much as the decker watches them.

choices.label: Extract audience influence and behavioral-response models
Trace hidden prototype links behind the mirror
Search for the impossible basement seam

nodes.title: Project Routing Constellation
nodes.description: Project names, routing signatures, creative departments, legal gates, and security exceptions glimmer in a constellation that refuses to show its lowest floor.

choices.label: Pull useful project names and routing metadata
Follow restricted routing into prototype R&D
Search for the hidden UV access metaphor

nodes.title: Rigging Control Catwalk
nodes.description: Lighting boards, elevator shafts, security-camera spotlights, production systems, and building-service hooks hang over the atrium like stage machinery.

choices.label: Seize a short-lived camera/elevator/studio control hook
Use the service catwalk to approach R&D
Evade the physical-security crosslink

nodes.title: Prototype War Room
nodes.description: Unfinished sets, animatics, sensory rigs, dream boards, and simsense prototype rooms sit under quiet CAT security attention.

choices.label: Extract prototype entertainment and simsense R&D
Locate the basement UV seam through prototype metadata
Force progress through serious corporate IC

nodes.title: Rights Collapse Console
nodes.description: The console can alter contracts, release controls, talent models, or research routing, but every edit threatens to collapse permissions into an alert state.

choices.label: Commit a high-value alteration and package proof
Break out of handler loops before they pin you

nodes.title: Black Stage Door Below the Floor Count
nodes.description: A door appears where the topology says no door can be: black stage paint, cold brass handle, no label, and an elevator tone from somewhere beneath the basement.

choices.label: Breach the Ultraviolet vestibule
Mark the seam and retreat before containment notices

nodes.title: Ultraviolet White Room
nodes.description: The Matrix stops acting like menus. A blank test room breathes, then becomes a stage, an audience, a pitch meeting, and a memory of a song you have not heard yet.

choices.label: Survive the host-native creative director construct
Read the room as an entertainment prototype instead of a file tree
Retreat through the black stage door

nodes.title: Living Stage Set
nodes.description: Sets rewrite themselves in response to attention. Prototype personalities, impossible audiences, and recursive media scenes test how influence becomes entertainment.

choices.label: Extract UV project codenames and influence-tech evidence
Hijack a symbolic production control in the UV layer
Escape before the host learns too much about you

nodes.title: UV Project Core
nodes.description: This is campaign-grade paydata: hidden project names, prototype media logic, executive culpability, and evidence of CAT capabilities beneath Lafayette Tower.

choices.label: Exfiltrate the UV proof through a hostile containment route
Stay for one more impossible answer

nodes.title: Exfiltration Edit Bay
nodes.description: You have material the crew can use: contracts, project names, behavioral models, prototype notes, building hooks, or proof that the tower is deeper than it admits.

choices.label: Log off through a clean edit bay render
Risk the deeper R&D route

nodes.title: Hard Cut to Black
nodes.description: The tower's spotlights wink out one by one. If the trace lattice did not firm up, CAT may only know that something briefly interrupted the show.
